name: [iam-jit] Audit-export channel degraded
message:
The iam-jit Bounce audit-export channel reported a failure in the last 15 minutes.

Fires on either:
  * `audit-export-degraded` rule (issue #267) — webhook backpressure, dropped events, or log write failures exceeded the configured threshold.
  * `AUDIT_DROPPED` synthetic event — the webhook pusher's bounded queue overflowed and dropped one or more events.

Either means the SIEM view of bouncer activity is incomplete. Operator action: check webhook reachability + auth token validity, check disk space on the bouncer host, then restart the export channel.

@your-team-here
